helpText.label: State Pension
helpText.contributionDescriptionP1: Private pension contributions are not used in this ruleset.
helpText.contributionDescriptionP2: Private pension contributions are not used in this ruleset.
helpText.statePensionDescriptionP1:
Enter your expected monthly state pension amount.

Refer to [this page](https://calcularsueldo.com.ar/jubilaciones/calcular-jubilacion){Calculadora de Jubilación} to find how to calculate yours.
helpText.statePensionDescriptionP2:
Enter your partner's expected monthly state pension amount.

Refer to [this page](https://calcularsueldo.com.ar/jubilaciones/calcular-jubilacion){Calculadora de Jubilación} to find how to calculate theirs

investmentTypes.label: MERVAL
investmentTypes.helpText: MERVAL index shares are subject to capital gains tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage} on gains. Securities traded on the Argentine stock exchange may have exemptions under certain conditions. Losses can be offset against gains.

investmentTypes.label: CEDEARs
investmentTypes.helpText: CEDEARs (Argentine Depositary Receipts) are subject to capital gains tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage} on gains. These represent shares of foreign companies traded on the Argentine exchange. Losses can be offset against gains.

investmentTypes.label: RSUs
investmentTypes.helpText: Restricted Stock Units are taxed as ordinary income at delivery (up to 35% withholding). Subsequent sale of vested shares is subject to capital gains tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage}.
